title: tephrosia spicata
intro: Tephrosia spicata is a plant species commonly known as the 'spiny pea' due to its spiny pods, which are native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Tephrosia spicata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves or roots to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
